mnemonics: ASR: Always Speak Clearly to Reduce Recognition Errors
keyPoints: Speech recognition converts spoken language to text
It involves acoustic modeling, language modeling, and pronunciation modeling
Common approaches include Hidden Markov Models (HMMs) and Deep Neural Networks (DNNs)
commonMistakes: Confusing speech recognition (audio to text) with speech synthesis (text to audio)
Assuming speech recognition works equally well for all accents and languages
Neglecting the importance of noise cancellation in real-world applications
